languages.text: "Ваши расчеты прискорбно ошибочны. Я выполняю приоритетную функцию в данных физических координатах".
"Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."
languages.original_text: "Ваши расчеты прискорбно ошибочны. Я выполняю приоритетную функцию в данных физических координатах".

traits.locale_text: "Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."
"Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."
"Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."

languages.text: “很遗憾，你的计算存在偏差。我正在当前物理坐标执行优先任务。”
languages.original_text: "Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."

traits.locale_text: “很遗憾，你的计算存在偏差。我正在当前物理坐标执行优先任务。”

languages.text: « Vos calculs sont malheureusement incorrects. Je suis en train d'effectuer une tâche prioritaire aux coordonnées physiques actuelles. »
languages.original_text: "Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."

traits.locale_text: « Vos calculs sont malheureusement incorrects. Je suis en train d'effectuer une tâche prioritaire aux coordonnées physiques actuelles. »

languages.text: "Hesaplamalar ne yazık ki hatalı. Mevcut fiziksel koordinatlarda öncelikli bir işlevi yerine getirmekteyim."
languages.original_text: "Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."

traits.locale_text: "Hesaplamalar ne yazık ki hatalı. Mevcut fiziksel koordinatlarda öncelikli bir işlevi yerine getirmekteyim."

languages.text: «Sus cálculos son erróneos, lamentablemente. Estoy realizando una función prioritaria en mis coordenadas físicas presentes».
languages.original_text: "Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."

traits.locale_text: «Sus cálculos son erróneos, lamentablemente. Estoy realizando una función prioritaria en mis coordenadas físicas presentes».

languages.text: "Eure Berechnungen sind bedauerlicherweise fehlerhaft. Ich erfülle eine priorisierte Funktion an den aktuellen physischen Koordinaten."
languages.original_text: "Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Berechnungen sind bedauerlicherweise fehlerhaft. Ich erfülle eine priorisierte Funktion an den aktuellen physischen Koordinaten."

languages.text: 「あなたの計算は残念ながら間違っています。私は現在地で優先機能を実行しています。」
languages.original_text: "Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの計算は残念ながら間違っています。私は現在地で優先機能を実行しています。」
